sub_modules.fp32_to_q32_32: Combinational IEEE-754 binary32 to signed Q32.32 fixed-point converter.
sub_modules.bandpass_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM containing the exact 101 coefficient words from the specification.
sub_modules.q32_32_fir_mac: Combinational 101-tap FIR multiply-accumulate over Q32.32 samples and coefficients.
sub_modules.q32_32_to_fp32: Combinational signed Q32.32 fixed-point to IEEE-754 binary32 converter.
